reviews.comment:
Parada obligada tanto para ir como para volver, aunque es muy incómodo la vuelta de 4 km que debe hacerse para cruzar a la mano contraria en la autopista, pero vale la pena por la grata atención recibida tanto en presencia como en ausencia de su propietario.
Debería resolverse la ampliación de los 100 metros de la colectora para permitir la circulación en ambos sentidos y evitar esa vuelta

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop both on the way there and back, although the 4 km detour required to cross to the opposite lane on the highway is quite inconvenient, but it's worth it for the excellent service received both when the owner is present and when he's not. The 100-meter widening of the access road should be addressed to allow two-way traffic and eliminate that detour.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHOWQtZXJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar. Queda de pasada literalmente, cargas combustible y compras algo para comer y sumas puntos en YPF. Tener juegos para los niños atrás con bancos entre medio para los grandes. Mesas con asientos de material y parrillas si querés comerte un asadito .
Pase hoy que era feriado y estaba abierto.
Podés cargar el agua del mate gratis y hay hielo también.

(Translated by Google)
Great place. It's literally right on the way; you fill up your tank, buy something to eat, and earn points at YPF. They have a playground for kids in the back with benches for adults. There are tables with hard-sided seats and grills if you want to have a barbecue.
I went by today, which was a holiday, and it was open. You can get free hot water for your mate (a traditional South American infused drink), and they have ice too.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHNHYzMDR3RRAB
